modules.comment: Set scale to Dorian/Phrygian/Mixolydian for authentic modal flavor (no leading-tone Ionian)
modules.name: transport

modules.comment: === TENOR DRONE ===  the cantus firmus pedal — a sustained open fifth/octave (latticesynth holds the modal final)
modules.name: drone

modules.comment: Pulser as slow re-strike for the drone (organum tenor doesn't decay; restrike very rarely)
modules.name: drone tap

modules.comment: === VOX PRINCIPALIS ===  the chant melody, top voice — bowed-string vielle character
modules.name: vox principalis

modules.comment: Chant line: stepwise modal melody, mostly conjunct motion
modules.name: chant

modules.comment: === VOX ORGANALIS ===  parallel voice at the perfect fifth — the defining medieval interval
modules.name: vox organalis

modules.comment: Same melodic shape as the chant, transposed down a fifth (open organum)
modules.name: organum line

modules.comment: === TROMPETTE ===  hurdy-gurdy buzzing bridge — rhythmic membrane tap on every quarter
modules.name: trompette

modules.comment: === CHURCH ===  CohomologyVerb tuned long for stone-cathedral resonance
modules.name: church
